com.jsyn.util

Interface Instrument

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    PolyphonicInstrument, VoiceAllocator

    public interface Instrument
    A note player that references one or more voices by a noteNumber. This is similar to the MIDI protocol that references voices by an integer pitch or keyIndex.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2011 Mobileer Inc

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods
